data.title: BlackRock to add 1-2% IBIT allocation to its model portfolios
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to an article published by ETFStore President Nate Geraci on the X platform, BlackRock plans to add 1-2% of the Bitcoin exchange-traded fund IBIT allocation to its model investment portfolio. BlackRock said it believes that Bitcoin has long-term investment value and has the potential to provide a unique and additional source of diversification for investment portfolios.

data.title: US SEC delays approval of Fidelity spot Ethereum ETF options
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced the postponement of approval of Fidelity Spot Ethereum ETF options.

data.title: SEC Delays Approval Of Fidelity's Spot Ethereum ETF Options
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has postponed its decision on approving Fidelity's spot Ethereum ETF options. The information was disclosed on the SEC's official website on March 1. This delay reflects ongoing regulatory scrutiny in the cryptocurrency sector as the SEC continues to evaluate the implications of such financial products.

data.title: BlackRock Increases Allocation To Bitcoin ETF In Investment Portfolio
data.description:
According to PANews, BlackRock Inc. is set to increase its allocation to the iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (IBIT) by 1% to 2% within its target allocation investment portfolios that permit alternative assets. This move, although a small part of BlackRock's overall model portfolio business, could open a new demand channel for IBIT, especially amid a downturn in cryptocurrency market sentiment. Model portfolios, which package funds into ready-made strategies for financial advisors, have seen rapid growth in recent years, and adjustments in their holdings can lead to significant capital inflows or outflows.

Michael Gates, the chief portfolio manager for BlackRock's target allocation ETF model portfolio series, stated in an investment commentary on February 27 that the company believes in the long-term investment value of Bitcoin and its potential to provide a unique and additional source of diversification for portfolios. A BlackRock spokesperson confirmed the adjustment in the model portfolio's allocation.

Earlier today, Bloomberg analysts reported that BlackRock is said to have added IBIT to one of its smaller model portfolios.

data.title: Two Arizona Bitcoin Reserve Bills Pass Senate and Head to House for Deliberation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news, two Bitcoin reserve bills in Arizona, the United States, have been passed by the Senate and submitted to the House of Representatives for deliberation. It is reported that SB 1025 was voted through with "17-11-2".

data.title: DeFi protocol Elixir releases video hinting at token launch
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DeFi protocol Elixir released a video, which may be intended to hint at the release of protocol tokens. Elixir completed a $8 million Series B financing last year, and the company's valuation reached $800 million.

data.title: Bitcoin concept stocks rose, MARA rose more than 10%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bitcoin concept stocks rose, Marathon Digital (MARA.O) rose more than 10%, Riot Blockchain (RIOT.O) rose more than 6%, and Coinbase (COIN.O) rose more than 3%. Bitcoin rebounded to above $84,000, having previously fallen below $80,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: LBank will list Major Frog (MAJORFROG)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank will launch Major Frog (MAJORFROG) at 23:40 (SGT) on February 28, and open the MAJORFROG/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 23:00 on March 1.
